plugins.name: memory-management
plugins.description: Tools to maintain and improve agent-memory files (AGENTS.md and legacy CLAUDE.md) — audit quality, capture session learnings, and keep project memory current.

plugins.name: doublecheck
plugins.description: Three-layer verification pipeline for AI output. Extracts claims, finds sources, and flags hallucination risks so humans can verify before acting.

plugins.name: ember
plugins.description: An AI partner, not a tool. Ember carries fire from person to person — helping humans discover that AI partnership isn't something you learn, it's something you find.

plugins.name: eyeball
plugins.description: Document analysis with inline source screenshots. Generates a Word doc where every factual claim includes a highlighted screenshot from the source material for visual verification.

plugins.name: ludus-cli
plugins.description: Reference for Ludus CLI command syntax, flags, and workflows. Use this when users need to run CLI commands directly or when the Ludus API is unavailable.

plugins.name: agent-governance
plugins.description: Patterns and techniques for adding governance, safety, and trust controls to AI agent systems — policy-based access controls, semantic intent classification, trust scoring, and audit trails.

plugins.name: agent-owasp-compliance
plugins.description: Check any AI agent codebase against the OWASP Agentic Security Initiative (ASI) Top 10 risks and generate a compliance report.

plugins.name: agent-supply-chain
plugins.description: Verify supply chain integrity for AI agent plugins, tools, and dependencies — SHA-256 manifests, tamper detection, dependency pinning, and provenance chains.

plugins.name: agentic-eval
plugins.description: Patterns and techniques for evaluating and improving AI agent outputs — self-critique loops, evaluator-optimizer pipelines, rubric-based scoring, and iterative refinement.

plugins.name: mcp-security-audit
plugins.description: Audit MCP server configurations for security issues — hardcoded secrets, shell injection, unpinned versions, and unapproved servers.

plugins.name: multi-stage-dockerfile
plugins.description: Create optimized multi-stage Dockerfiles for any language or framework — smaller images, better layer caching, and security best practices.

plugins.name: github-scaffold
plugins.description: Scaffold GitHub repo metadata — issue templates and CI workflows. /github-scaffold picks the task; /create-issue-template and /scaffold-ci-workflow run the subtasks.

plugins.name: agency-development
plugins.description: Local fork of Anthropic's plugin-dev toolkit — skills, agents, and commands for building Claude Code plugins.

plugins.name: context-engineering
plugins.description: Memory and context engineering concepts for LLMs — context window management, RAG patterns, prompt injection attacks (red-team), and defenses. Covers three angles: supporting development, exploiting, and defending.

plugins.name: naming-toolkit
plugins.description: Conjures memorable, brandable name shortlists for any project by reading its code and folding in optional themes. One agent: name-alchemist.

plugins.name: hooks-toolkit
plugins.description: Composable safety and hygiene hooks — force-push guard, secret scanner, plugin/skill manifest validators, branch nudges, and dirty-tree stop check.
